key.name: horizontal-position
key.summary: Horizontal position of the notification banner
key.description: Horizontal anchor within the primary monitor work area: left, center, or right. GNOME's panel code resets the banner's horizontal alignment on certain events; this extension re-enforces the configured value.

key.name: vertical-position
key.summary: Vertical position of the notification banner
key.description: Vertical anchor within the primary monitor work area: top, center, or bottom.

key.name: padding-horizontal
key.description: Gap in pixels between the banner and the left or right screen edge. Ignored when the horizontal position is center.

key.name: padding-vertical
key.description: Gap in pixels between the banner and the top or bottom screen edge. Ignored when the vertical position is center.

key.name: dedupe-title
key.description: When the notification title equals the application name shown in the banner header, hide the duplicated title line.

key.name: body-multiline
key.summary: Keep newlines in the notification body
key.description: GNOME collapses newlines in the body to spaces. When enabled, the body keeps its line breaks (shown fully when the banner is expanded).

key.name: show-timestamp
key.summary: Show the timestamp in the banner header
key.description: Whether to show the relative time label (for example "Just now") in the banner header.

key.name: force-expand
key.description: Show the banner in its expanded form right away (full body text and any action buttons), instead of waiting for hover or a critical urgency.

key.name: show-app-icon
key.summary: Show the application icon in the header
key.description: Whether to show the small application icon in the banner header.

key.name: show-notification-icon
key.description: Whether to show the large notification icon next to the content (shown only when the notification provides one).

key.name: banner-width
key.description: Width of the banner in pixels. 0 keeps the GNOME default (34em).

key.name: corner-radius
key.description: Corner radius of the banner in pixels. -1 keeps the GNOME default.

key.name: font-scale
key.description: Scales the banner text size. 100 keeps the GNOME default.
